name: Wow. Bread lover. AGAIN.
description:
★"How do you call Kasane Teto?!"★

Lowkey, I thought I would never do this again. But here we are. 🥀

TETO my beloved. Kidding. I forgot the Personality of Teto... Soooo

Guys, play limbus, it's peak, shotout to WinterAtTwo for making me play that game 3 weeks straight.

DON QUIXOTE IS MY WIFE

Anyways, ts out.

tags: vocaloid, Teto, Kasane Teto, Kasane, bread, baguette, idk, limbus company, peak, girlfriend, whatever.
